generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that underfunded defense programs have left our allies vulnerable to cyber threats? Just last year, a small but critical defense project was delayed due to budget cuts, putting our partners at risk. It's time to prioritize our defense spending to ensure we're all protected. #NationalSecurity #DefenseMatters
